phase: Fase 3 de 20 — Mobile, fullscreen, PWA e acessibilidade

tests.name: npm test
tests.coverage: JS syntax, content integrity, i18n catalogs, save manager, build sync, local paths

tests.name: static mobile CSS audit
tests.coverage: touch targets >=48px, safe-area, 100dvh/app-height, sticky action bars, landscape media query

tests.name: a11y controls audit
tests.coverage: large text, high contrast, reduced motion, install prompt controls and ARIA pressed states

tests.name: PWA manifest audit
tests.coverage: fullscreen display, theme color, 192/512 icons, service worker cache build id

tests.name: browser automation note
tests.coverage: Playwright/Chromium navigation was blocked by administrator in this environment; static and unit audits completed.

result: approved with environment limitation: no automated browser screenshot due administrator block
